name: Marketing Engagement Intake
description: Marketing strategy and execution intake for organizations seeking to diagnose marketing performance, define positioning, or build demand generation capability. Evaluates positioning clarity, channel mix, attribution, budget allocation, team composition, and funnel performance to produce a marketing engagement profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-engagement actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Marketing Engagement Profile
types.description: Generated marketing engagement profile from intake session data.
